TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qhoniq, title = qhoniq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qhoniq} }

S.FORM: == qhoniq == baq smli' qsya' qu gamil na qhuniq hiya'. 'n_gyutun nya' posa' qu qsya'. msturing ru mssli'. wal mskura' sa gong ru llyung. hya' ga qhuniq sawn uzi qu kkayal, qhuniq qani hya ga mutuw galan qayqaya' na ngasal ini' ga qayqaya' pptzyuwaw qmayah. qhniq hya ga aring sa gamil ru tunux na qhuniq lru qbuci' niya' lru yaqu qara' niya' kya la, musa' tay llyuw lga nanu' yaqu abaw kya la. qbuci' na qhuniq lga, kya qu yulaq ru hi' na qhuniq, maki' squ hi' na qhuniq ga mluw squ inrkyasan niya' ru kya uzi qu si pgluq mshzyu' kruma' qu tuqi hya', ga kya uzi qu ptqipay la tuqi na inrkyasan niya' uzi. kruma' ga yasa qu ptqara' lga, m'mumu' haru hmbku' kya qu qara' niya' la. tayhuk sa pkbwazyan niya' lga, ptnaral hru mkphpah kya la, ru wahan p'imaw na hzing qu qmu' na phpah niya' lga, yasa qu thuzyay' maki' qu bway niya' la, nanu' blaq qu pinkbway niya' ga, krahu' qu bway niya' lru thuzyay' kya uzi qu qpuri' niya' la, nanu' yaqu qpuri' niya' qasa qu mshutaw lru hmbku' kya lawzi qu hbku' na qhuniq giqas lawzi la.

== qhoniq == baq smli' qsya' qu gamil na qhuniq hiya'. 'n_gyutun nya' posa' qu qsya'. msturing ru mssli'. wal mskura' sa gong ru llyung. hya' ga qhuniq sawn uzi qu kkayal, qhuniq qani hya ga mutuw galan qayqaya' na ngasal ini' ga qayqaya' pptzyuwaw qmayah. qhniq hya ga aring sa gamil ru tunux na qhuniq lru qbuci' niya' lru yaqu qara' niya' kya la, musa' tay llyuw lga nanu' yaqu abaw kya la. qbuci' na qhuniq lga, kya qu yulaq ru hi' na qhuniq, maki' squ hi' na qhuniq ga mluw squ inrkyasan niya' ru kya uzi qu si pgluq mshzyu' kruma' qu tuqi hya', ga kya uzi qu ptqipay la tuqi na inrkyasan niya' uzi. kruma' ga yasa qu ptqara' lga, m'mumu' haru hmbku' kya qu qara' niya' la. tayhuk sa pkbwazyan niya' lga, ptnaral hru mkphpah kya la, ru wahan p'imaw na hzing qu qmu' na phpah niya' lga, yasa qu thuzyay' maki' qu bway niya' la, nanu' blaq qu pinkbway niya' ga, krahu' qu bway niya' lru thuzyay' kya uzi qu qpuri' niya' la, nanu' yaqu qpuri' niya' qasa qu mshutaw lru hmbku' kya lawzi qu hbku' na qhuniq giqas lawzi la.
S.PHON: == qħoniq == βaq s~ɕmliʔ qs~ɕjaʔ qu ɣamil na qħuniq ħijaʔ. ʔnɣjutun njaʔ pos~ɕaʔ qu qs~ɕjaʔ. ms~ɕturiŋ ru ms~ɕs~ɕliʔ. wal ms~ɕkuraʔ s~ɕa ɣoŋ ru lljuŋ. ħjaʔ ɣa qħuniq s~ɕawn uzi qu kkajal, qħuniq qani ħja ɣa mutuw ɣalan qajqajaʔ na ŋas~ɕal iniʔ ɣa qajqajaʔ pptzjuwaw qmajaħ. qħniq ħja ɣa ariŋ s~ɕa ɣamil ru tunux na qħuniq lru qβuʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ lru jaqu qaraʔ nijaʔ kja la, mus~ɕaʔ taj lljuw lɣa nanuʔ jaqu aβaw kja la. qβuʦ~ʨiʔ na qħuniq lɣa, kja qu julaq ru ħiʔ na qħuniq, makiʔ s~ɕqu ħiʔ na qħuniq ɣa mluw s~ɕqu inrkjas~ɕan nijaʔ ru kja uzi qu s~ɕi pɣluq ms~ɕħzjuʔ krumaʔ qu tuqi ħjaʔ, ɣa kja uzi qu ptqipaj la tuqi na inrkjas~ɕan nijaʔ uzi. krumaʔ ɣa jas~ɕa qu ptqaraʔ lɣa, mʔmumuʔ ħaru ħmβkuʔ kja qu qaraʔ nijaʔ la. tajħuk s~ɕa pkβwazjan nijaʔ lɣa, ptnaral ħru mkpħpaħ kja la, ru waħan pʔimaw na ħziŋ qu qmuʔ na pħpaħ nijaʔ lɣa, jas~ɕa qu tħuzjajʔ makiʔ qu βwaj nijaʔ la, nanuʔ βlaq qu pinkβwaj nijaʔ ɣa, kraħuʔ qu βwaj nijaʔ lru tħuzjajʔ kja uzi qu qpuriʔ nijaʔ la, nanuʔ jaqu qpuriʔ nijaʔ qas~ɕa qu ms~ɕħutaw lru ħmβkuʔ kja lawzi qu ħβkuʔ na qħuniq ɣiqas~ɕ lawzi la.
